---
title: "Chapter 2: Introduction"
output: html_document
---

# Introduction

Data analysis begins with understanding basic summaries. Suppose we collect data on the daily coffee consumption of five software engineers.

## The Dataset

Let's initialize our sample dataset using an R code block. We will store the number of cups consumed in a vector named `coffee_cups`.

```{r coffee-data}
# Vector of coffee cups consumed
coffee_cups <- c(3, 4, 2, 5, 4)
print(coffee_cups)
